meta.title: Monte da Estrada - Rural Tourism in Alentejo
meta.description: Rural Tourism in Alentejo. Enjoy the tranquility of the Alentejo countryside in a welcoming and authentic environment near the Costa Vicentina beaches.
meta.keywords: alentejo, rural tourism, zambujeira do mar, accommodation, vacation, portugal, costa vicentina, nature

welcome.title: Welcome to Monte da Estrada
paragraphs: Monte da Estrada is a traditional Alentejo farmhouse that has been converted into quality rural tourism, preserving authenticity and contact with nature.

For generations, this was a space dedicated to agriculture - wheat, barley, potatoes, corn and watermelon - and livestock farming. Today, maintaining respect for tradition, we have created this place with our guests in mind, focusing on comfort, privacy, functionality and contact with nature.
Located in the Zambujeira do Mar region, in the heart of Alentejo, Monte da Estrada offers a unique experience of tranquility and authenticity.

items.title: Absolute Tranquility
